name: 18S_V2_Rhizaria
description: 18S rRNA hypervariable region V2 in eukaryotic group Rhizaria. ~160 bp on the S. cerevisiae rrn18 numbering (positions 135-295). Cercozoans, foraminifera, radiolaria; sediment + plankton. V4 and V9 are the most widely used metabarcoding targets for eukaryotes (Stoeck 2010, de Vargas 2015 Tara Oceans). Allow high mismatch for cross-clade biology.
